quality_cases.prompt: Reply with exactly this single word and no punctuation: PARETOPILOT
Reply with only the integer result of 17 plus 25.
Reply with only the city name: What is the capital of France?
Reply with only the next integer in this sequence: 2, 4, 6, 8,
Reply with only YES or NO: Is a whale a mammal?

performance.prompt: ParetoPilot evaluates several inference configurations on one controlled Arm64 host. It records raw samples, validates provenance, applies a declared quality floor and resource ceilings, computes the non-dominated candidates, and explains why a configuration should or should not be deployed. Summarize the value of transparent, reproducible optimization evidence for an engineering team.
